Synthetic SDS Fixture: Flammable Aerosol D
Supplier: Synthetic Fixture Laboratory
Revision: 2026-05-06

Section 2 - Hazard Identification
Extremely flammable aerosol. Pressurized container may burst if heated.

Section 4 - First Aid Measures
If inhaled, move person to fresh air and keep comfortable for breathing.

Section 5 - Fire Fighting Measures
Use dry chemical, carbon dioxide, or foam. Cool containers exposed to fire with
water spray from a safe distance.

Section 7 - Handling and Storage
Do not spray on an open flame or other ignition source. Protect from sunlight.
Do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50 C.

Section 8 - Exposure Controls and Personal Protection
Use only outdoors or in a well-ventilated area. Wear safety glasses during use.
